title: poa pringlei
intro: Poa pringlei, also known as Pringle's blue grass or Pringle's bluegrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to the western United States and is a perennial grass that grows in dry to moist soil. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Poa pringlei is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
